task_completion.description: Open the specified OpenToonz scene file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz application is open and the window title, xsheet, or file browser indicates that 'dwanko_run.tnz' has been loaded.

task_completion.description: Apply a Blur effect to the animation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FX Schematic or Xsheet/Timeline shows a 'Blur' effect node added and connected to the animation column.

task_completion.description: Set the Blur effect radius to at least 5.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FX Settings panel for the Blur effect is visible, showing the 'Value' or 'Radius' parameter set to 5 or greater.

task_completion.description: Set the output directory to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/blur_fx/' and the format to PNG.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Output Settings window is open, showing the 'Save In' path set to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/blur_fx/' (or similar valid path) and the file format dropdown set to 'png'.

task_completion.description: Configure the render settings to output at least 20 frames.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Output Settings window shows the 'From' and 'To' frame numbers spanning a range of at least 20 frames (e.g., 1 to 20).
A rendering progress bar/window is visible in OpenToonz, or a file manager/terminal shows the newly generated PNG files in the target output directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenToonz GUI to apply effects and render, rather than using terminal scripts or ImageMagick to fake the blur.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with OpenToonz menus, schematic, and output settings rather than terminal commands executing image processing tools.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual OpenToonz application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz workspace is clearly visible with its characteristic panels (viewer, xsheet, schematic, fx settings), not a mock-up or text editor.

integrity.description: The rendered output was generated by OpenToonz's render engine.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'Render' button in OpenToonz and the render progress dialog appears, rather than just copying pre-existing files via terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Scene path: /home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz. Output directory: /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/blur_fx. Minimum frame count: 20. Minimum blur radius: 5.
